articles.title: KMSC to hold protests against fuel price hike across state
articles.description: The Kisan Mazdoor Sangharsh Committee (KMSC) on Saturday announced statewide effigy-burning protests on June 8 against the recent increase in diesel and petrol prices, the proposed India-US free trade agreements, land acquisition policies, fertiliser shortages and the alleged police lathi-charge on power employees in Patiala.
